title: The Government Rewrites the Story
description: On pages 14, 15, 16, 17, this part focuses on a kingdom wakes from war. Alabasta starts facing the aftermath of Crocodile’s deception while Vivi, Cobra, the rebels, and the Straw Hats recover from the civil war.
scene: This scene belongs to the A Kingdom Wakes from War sequence. The important beat is the dialogue and action around Luffy, Alabasta citizen, Vivi, King Cobra, Smoker.

dialogue.speaker: Alabasta citizen
dialogue.text: ...where's yell? I can't see him anywhere.

dialogue.speaker: King Cobra
dialogue.text: What are you doing up there!?

dialogue.speaker: King Cobra
dialogue.text: I've been looking for you guys!

dialogue.speaker: Nico Robin
dialogue.text: What're you guys doing down there?

summary: Alabasta starts facing the aftermath of Crocodile’s deception while Vivi, Cobra, the rebels, and the Straw Hats recover from the civil war.
